# How Jamf reached 89% active usage in eight weeks with Claude Enterprise in AWS Marketplace

**Jamf** manages and secures Apple devices for more than 70,000 customers worldwide. When the company set out to bring AI to its entire workforce, they chose Claude Enterprise as a tool any employee could pick up on day one. They paired the rollout with a governance framework that sorted use cases by risk and complexity, and a campaign that focused on what employees could reclaim rather than what they could optimize.

## With Claude, Jamf achieved:

- 89% active usage among licensed employees within eight weeks of company-wide launch
- 285 documented use cases across all 16 departments, with 98 fully implemented
- ~838 estimated hours saved per month from HR's 21 implemented use cases alone, with 15 additional departments still completing documentation
- 208 employees actively creating and sharing reusable Claude Skills, including HR, Legal, and Enterprise Transformation
- An interactive AI Department Scorecard built with Claude in roughly eight hours, now reviewed weekly by all 16 department leaders
- Expansion from 1,000 to 2,000 licenses in two months
